meta.description: Target distribution template for a standard MTG set, derived from analysis of 5 recent sets (Duskmourn, Bloomburrow, Outlaws of Thunder Junction, Murders at Karlov Manor, The Lost Caverns of Ixalan).

basic_lands.note: 1 per color, full-art versions optional; consistent across all analyzed sets

common.note: Avg 95.4; high variance (stdev 11.0) due to LCI having 113 commons

color_distribution.description: Percentage of non-land, non-colorless cards per mono-color. Mono-color cards form ~75-81% of non-land cards; multicolor and colorless fill the rest.

colorless_pct.note: LCI was an outlier at 15.1% due to heavy artifact theme. Typical range 3-5%.

multicolor_count.note: DSK/OTJ/LCI had 0; BLB/MKM had 10. Bimodal distribution.

colorless_count.note: LCI outlier at 11 due to artifact theme
LCI outlier at 16 due to artifact theme

per_color_count.note: DSK highest at ~3.6 avg per color; LCI lowest

creature_pct.note: Avg across 5 sets; includes enchantment creatures and artifact creatures

instant_pct.note: MKM highest (detective theme = more instants); LCI lowest

enchantment_only_pct.note: DSK highest (17%) due to enchantment theme; OTJ lowest (6.5%)

artifact_only_pct.note: LCI highest (15.1%) due to artifact theme; OTJ lowest (3.3%)

noncreature_spell_pct.note: Instants + sorceries + enchantments + artifacts at common

land_pct.note: Includes common nonbasic lands; varies significantly

noncreature_spell_pct.note: MKM highest due to detective theme

mana_curve.description: Percentage of non-land cards at each CMC, computed from 5 analyzed sets

cmc_0.note: No CMC-0 cards observed in any of the 5 sets

cmc_7plus.note: DSK was an outlier at 8.7% due to horror theme high-cost cards

W.note: White tends to curve lower with efficient small creatures

B.note: Black has the widest CMC variance across sets

R.note: Red tends to curve lower, aggressive

G.note: Green often has higher-CMC creatures for ramp strategies

average_cmc.note: Mythics skew significantly higher in CMC

flying.note: Most common evergreen keyword by far

first_strike.note: DSK had 0; relatively uncommon in modern sets

haste.note: Red gets most haste; some bleeds to G

hexproof.note: Very rare in modern sets; ward has largely replaced it

indestructible.note: Only MKM and LCI had 1 each; very rare as a keyword

vigilance.note: Consistent keyword; W and G primary

ward.note: LCI highest at 9; replacing hexproof in modern design

unique_keyword_count.note: Avg 19.6; includes both named mechanics and ability words. Stdev 4.2.

set_mechanics.note: Named set mechanics (like plot, disguise, explore) typically appear on 8-40 cards each, spread across 2-5 colors. Most sets have 3-5 major named mechanics plus several minor returning mechanics.

legendary_creatures.note: Avg 27.6; OTJ was an outlier at 43 (western outlaw theme). Stdev 9.7.

planeswalkers.note: Avg 1.2; only OTJ had 2. All at mythic rarity.

nonbasic_lands.note: Avg 19.0; LCI highest (34) with cave/land theme

equipment.note: Avg 7.2; BLB had only 2; LCI had 12

vehicles.note: Avg 2.4; LCI had 6; all sets had at least 1

sagas.note: Only DSK and LCI had 1 each; not standard in modern sets

modal_dfc.note: None of the 5 analyzed sets used modal DFCs

transform_dfc.note: Only LCI had transform DFCs (35). Highly set-specific. Default to 0 unless set design calls for it.

total_removal_spells.note: Avg 78.4; BLB highest (90); LCI lowest (69). Stdev 8.0.

common_removal.note: Avg 31.4; critical for limited play. OTJ highest (39).

per_color_minimum.note: Every color should have at least 3 removal-adjacent effects. Even U (lowest) averaged 8 total removal cards.

U.note: Blue removal: bounce, counterspells, tap effects

R.note: Red removal: damage-based; highest removal color

G.note: Green removal: fight, bite, artifact/enchantment destruction

colorless.note: Colorless removal from artifacts; varies widely

signpost_uncommons.description: One or more multicolor uncommon per color pair that signals the draft archetype. 4 of 5 sets had all 10 pairs covered; LCI covered 9.

avg_uncommon_multicolor_total.note: Total uncommon multicolor cards; some pairs get 2+ signpost cards

creature_stats.description: Average power/toughness by CMC across all 5 sets. Use as baseline for creature stat-lines.

7.note: Small sample size; some are high-toughness walls

as_fan.description: Expected number of copies of a keyword per draft booster pack (10C + 3U + 1R/M). Averaged across 5 sets.

draft_booster.note: Classic draft booster format (pre-Play Booster). Recommended for custom set draft.

play_booster.note: Current WotC format (since MKM, Feb 2024). More variance per pack.

set_size_scaling.description: Formulas for scaling the template to different set sizes. All targets above are calibrated to a ~277-card set. Use these ratios to adjust for different total card counts.

constraints: Mythics should stay in range 15-25 regardless of scaling
Commons >= 80 to support draft (need enough variety for 10 per pack)
Uncommons >= 60 to support draft (need enough variety for 3 per pack)
Rarity counts must sum to total_booster_cards - basic_lands

50_card_set.note: V0 prototype. Not draftable but tests generation pipeline.

150_card_set.note: Small set. Marginal for draft but functional.

constraints: Each mono-color should get equal or near-equal card counts (within 1 card)
Multicolor cards scale with set size but should cover all 10 color pairs
At uncommon, ensure at least 1 signpost per color pair (minimum 10 multicolor uncommons)
Creature percentage should stay within 50-60% regardless of set size
Every color needs at least 1 removal spell at common (minimum 5 common removal total)
Planeswalkers: 1 for sets under 200 cards, 1-2 for standard sets
Average CMC should remain between 2.9 and 3.5
CMC 2-3 should always be the peak (combined 50%+ of non-land cards)
At least 10% of non-land cards at CMC 1 for aggro archetypes
CMC 7+ should not exceed 10% to avoid too many uncastable cards in limited
Flying should always be the most common evergreen keyword
At minimum, each evergreen keyword should appear on at least 1 card in sets of 100+
Ward count may be 0 in very small sets (under 100 cards)
Minimum 15 removal spells in any draftable set
Common removal should be at least 40% of total removal
Each color except U should have at least 2 removal spells; U gets counterspells instead
At least 1 planeswalker in any set of 100+ cards
Legendary creatures scale roughly linearly but minimum 5 for a draftable set
Equipment minimum 2 for sets of 100+
Nonbasic lands minimum 5 for mana fixing in draft
